meta.title: DEF CON 32 - Bluetooth Blues: Unmasking CVE 2023-52709-The TI BLE5-Stack Attack - Kevin Mitchell
meta.description: In this talk, I will detail my discovery and analysis of CVE 2023-52709, a vulnerability in the TI Bluetooth stack. This flaw allows the stack to fail in generating a resolvable Random Private Address (RPA), which can lead to a Denial of Service (DoS) for already bonded peer devices. The discussion will cover the technical aspects of the vulnerability, the implications for automotive security, and potential mitigation strategies.
